# KeepSync
# https://lachlanallison.github.io/keepsync/

> Self-hosted, open-source browser extension for syncing tabs and bookmarks across your own devices. Privacy-focused — you host the server, no third-party sync service required.

## Pages
- /
- /privacy.html

## Product
- Chrome and Firefox extensions
- Self-hosted sync server (Go)
- Real-time tab and bookmark sync across paired devices
- Multiple pairing methods

## Install
- Firefox: https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/keepsync/
- Source and self-host setup: https://github.com/lachlanallison/keepsync

## About
- Built by Lachlan Allison: https://lachlanallison.com/
- Privacy policy: /privacy.html
